title: Package misidentified as dead, causing Internal Error, Broken link in node->dtypep()

features.name: package with enum typedef and localparam
features.description: Code should include a package containing both a localparam integer constant and a typedef enum definition

features.name: module parameter default referencing package constant via scope resolution
features.description: Code should include a module parameter that uses the :: scope resolution operator to reference a constant defined in a package

features.name: port sized by computed parameter referencing package constant
features.description: Code should include an input or output port whose width is computed from a module parameter that itself references a package constant via ::
features.snippet:
input  var [paramOne-1:0] a
, output var [paramOne-1:0] b
